zh.lifeSummary: 當John Mautravers VI於1290年4月出生在英國多瑟特武爾可姆時，他的父親John Mautravers V24歲，母親Eleanor Gorges22歲。他於1310年與Milicent Berkeley在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1364年2月16日在英國多瑟特享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特萊謝特 馬特拉維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Mautravers VI于1290年4月出生在英国多瑟特武爾可姆时，他的父亲John Mautravers V24岁，母亲Eleanor Gorges22岁。他于1310年与Milicent Berkeley在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1364年2月16日在英国多瑟特享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特萊謝特 馬特拉維斯。

variants.name: Matravers
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Mautravert in Chérencé-le-Héron (Manche).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Mautravers VI was born in April 1290, in Woolcombe, Dorset, England, his father, John Mautravers V, was 24 and his mother, Eleanor Gorges, was 22. He married Milicent Berkeley in 1310, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 16 February 1364, in Dorset, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Mautravers VI est né en avril 1290, à Woolcombe, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John Mautravers V, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Gorges, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Milicent Berkeley en 1310, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 16 février 1364, à Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Mautravers VI im April 1290 in Woolcombe, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Mautravers V 24 und seine Mutter Eleanor Gorges 22. Er hat 1310 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England Milicent Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 16. Februar 1364 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Dorset, England und wurde in Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Mautravers VI è nato il nel aprile 1290 nel Woolcombe, Dorset, England, il suo padre, John Mautravers V, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Gorges, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Milicent Berkeley nel 1310, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 febbraio 1364, nel Dorset, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Mautravers VIが1290年4月にイギリスドールセトウルコンベで生まれた時，父John Mautravers Vは24歳，母Eleanor Gorgesは22歳であった。1310年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーでMilicent Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1364年2月16日にイギリスドールセトで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトリトチェット マトラバーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Mautravers VI(이)가 1290년 4월 영국 도르세트 보코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Mautravers V(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Gorges(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1310년 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 Milicent Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1364년 2월 16일 영국 도르세트에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 리트쳇 마트레이버스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Mautravers VI nasceu em abril de 1290, em Woolcombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Mautravers V, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Gorges, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Milicent Berkeley em 1310, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1364, em Dorset, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Mautravers VI родился апрель 1290 г. в местности вулкомб, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Mautravers V было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Gorges, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Milicent Berkeley в 1310 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 16 февраля 1364 г. в местности дорсет, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности личетт матравирс, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Milicent Berkeley en 1310, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de febrero de 1364, en Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
